commands: yarn run openapi-generator-cli generate --git-repo-id=daytona --git-user-id=daytonaio -i apps/daemon/pkg/toolbox/docs/swagger.json -g java --additional-properties=groupId=io.daytona,artifactId=daytona-toolbox-api-client,apiPackage=io.daytona.toolbox.client.api,modelPackage=io.daytona.toolbox.client.model,invokerPackage=io.daytona.toolbox.client,library=okhttp-gson,java8=true,hideGenerationTimestamp=true,useRuntimeException=true -o {projectRoot}/src
